description: Design a compact single-story tiny house floor plan from scratch in Sweet Home 3D with overall exterior dimensions of approximately 8 meters long by 4 meters wide. The house must include four functional zones: a living area, kitchen/dining area, bedroom, and a fully enclosed bathroom. The plan must incorporate exterior perimeter walls, at least two interior partition walls, one entry door, one interior door, and at least three windows. Define and name the four rooms (e.g., 'Living Room', 'Kitchen', 'Bedroom', 'Bathroom'), furnish every zone with appropriate items from the catalog, and add at least two dimension lines documenting the overall length and width. Save the completed plan to ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/tiny_house_plan.sh3d.
